title: Atom Age Vampire
writer: Piero Monviso, Gino De Santis, Alberto Bevilacqua
actors: Alberto Lupo, Susanne Loret, Sergio Fantoni
plot: An exotic dancer is disfigured in a car accident. A scientist develops a treatment that restores her beauty. To preserve her appearance the doctor must give her additional treatments using glands taken from murdered women.
